cp3_condition: Add reviewer calibration notes for scaffolding scale values.

verbal_level.label: no added wording
verbal_level.review_note: Exam-like or independent task wording; no scaffold beyond the source prompt.

verbal_level.label: minimal cue
verbal_level.review_note: A short cue or reminder is present, but the student chooses the procedure.

verbal_level.label: light guided wording
verbal_level.review_note: The task names the representation or operation but does not provide steps.

verbal_level.label: step cueing
verbal_level.review_note: The task gives partial procedural sequencing or asks substeps separately.

verbal_level.label: worked scaffold
verbal_level.review_note: Most of the procedure is explicitly guided; student fills key values or decisions.

verbal_level.label: full worked example
verbal_level.review_note: The procedure is effectively demonstrated before or during the task.

visual_stage.label: visual provided and labelled
visual_stage.review_note: The visual representation is provided with explicit labels or highlighted reading path.

visual_stage.label: visual provided without full guidance
visual_stage.review_note: The visual or table is present, but the student must choose values or paths.

visual_stage.label: student constructs visual
visual_stage.review_note: The student must draw, complete, or transform the visual representation.

visual_stage.label: no visual support or exam-like source only
visual_stage.review_note: No extra instructional visual is supplied beyond the source/exam material.

fading_position.label: not part of a fading sequence
fading_position.review_note: Use for standalone exam records or records where sequence position is unknown.

fading_position.label: early guided practice
fading_position.review_note: High support; first or early exercise after explanation.

fading_position.label: middle practice
fading_position.review_note: Some supports removed; student applies known steps.

fading_position.label: late independent practice
fading_position.review_note: Support mostly faded; task resembles target/exam performance.

dual_coding_present_rule: Use true when the exercise explanation or task relies on a visual/table/graph representation as part of the learning route. Begeleide inoefening graph tasks require true even when verbal support is low.
reviewer_warning: These calibration notes support review consistency; they do not authorize student diagnostics or adaptive routing.
